description: User clicks the 'Askable' extension button in the browser toolbar, deactivating the extension panel.
frame_description: The browser toolbar shows the 'Askable' extension button losing its active blue highlight.

description: User clicks the 'Askable' extension button in the browser toolbar, reactivating the extension panel.
frame_description: The browser toolbar shows the 'Askable' extension button gaining an active blue highlight.
